urn:sdmx:org.sdmx.infomodel.datastructur.name: Census 2016, Total Household Income (Weekly) by Household Composition (SA2+)
urn:sdmx:org.sdmx.infomodel.datastructur.description: Dataset: ABS_C16_T21_SA. Census 2016 LGA based data for Total Household Income (Weekly) by Household Composition, for the 2016 Census of Population and Housing. Unit of measure: Count of all persons on Census night, based on place of usual residence. Excludes Overseas Visitors. Geographic coverage: Australia/State/GCCSA/SA4/SA3/SA2. Catalogue number: 2916.0
